title: chamaecrista pygmaea var. pygmaea
intro: Chamaecrista pygmaea var. pygmaea, also known as the Dwarf Sensitive Plant, is a compact and delicate variety of the Sensitive Plant species, characterized by its small leaves and stems that fold up when touched. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of Chamaecrista pygmaea var. pygmaea include its ability to improve wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular herbal remedy for skin issues and minor cuts. Chamaecrista pygmaea var. pygmaea can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or topical cream, depending on the desired application and the specific health benefit being sought.
